response: The cities of Beitun, Xinjiang, and Wafangdian are all classified as county-level cities. Beitun is a county-level city under the direct administration of the regional government in Xinjiang. Wafangdian is one of the two "northern county-level cities" in Liaoning province, China, and also a county-level city. These cities are administrative divisions within the broader structure of China's provincial-level administrative regions.
